title: OutCombatLog
description: вңЁ Anti-PvP leave, Item CD, Punishments. BossBar, sounds, chat messages, and more!
body:
# вҡ”пёҸ OutCombatLog вҖ” Ultimate Combat Logging Prevention System

The most advanced combat logging prevention plugin for Minecraft. Beautiful BossBar timers, item cooldowns, command blocking, and complete customization for your server's PvP experience.



--- ## вҡ”пёҸ About OutCombatLog **OutCombatLog** is not just another combat logger вҖ” it's a **complete combat logging prevention system** for your Minecraft server. Unlike standard plugins that simply punish players, OutCombatLog delivers a professional experience with beautiful BossBar timers, stunning visual feedback, and unparalleled customization options. Whether you're running a small PvP server with friends or a large factions network with hundreds of players, OutCombatLog adapts to your needs with its flexible configuration system, item cooldowns, and comprehensive combat protection. --- ## вңЁ Feature Showcase ### вҡ”пёҸ Core PvP Features | Feature | Description | |---------|-------------| | **PvP Timer** | Configurable duration (default: 30 seconds) that resets with each hit | | **BossBar Display** | Beautiful BossBar on top with real-time timer and custom text | | **Combat on Death** | Configurable - killer remains in PvP after kill to prevent instant logout | | **Logout Punishment** | Players who log out during PvP are killed with item drops like normal death | | **Login Notification** | Players are notified when they log in if they left during PvP | ### рҹӣЎпёҸ Protection & Safety | Feature | Description | |---------|-------------| | **Command Blocking** | Block all commands during PvP except allowed ones (msg, tell, help, etc.) | | **Ender Chest Block** | Prevent players from opening Ender Chests during combat | | **Logout Broadcast** | Alert players in radius (configurable) when someone combat logs | | **Item Cooldowns** | Custom cooldowns for specific items during PvP only | ### вҸұпёҸ Item Cooldowns (EXAMPLE) | Item | Default Cooldown | |------|------------------| | **ENDER_PEARL** | 15 seconds | | **ENCHANTED_GOLDEN_APPLE** | 60 seconds | | **GOLDEN_APPLE** | 30 seconds | | **CHORUS_FRUIT** | 10 seconds | | **FIREWORK_ROCKET** | 10 seconds | | **ENDER_CHEST** | 30 seconds | > **Note:** All cooldowns are fully configurable and only apply during PvP mode! ### рҹ”Ҡ Audio & Visual | Feature | Description | |---------|-------------| | **Combat Start Sound** | Configurable sound when entering PvP | | **Combat Tick Sound** | Ticking sound 3 seconds before PvP ends | | **Combat End Sound** | Victory sound when PvP timer expires | | **BossBar Customization** | Full RGB color support, custom text, and timer display | | **BossBar Styles** | Multiple styles: PROGRESS, NOTCHED_6, NOTCHED_10, NOTCHED_12, NOTCHED_20 | ### рҹ‘‘ Admin Features | Feature | Description | |---------|-------------| | **Config Reload** | `/ocl reload` - Reload configuration without restart | | **Item List** | `/ocl list` - View all items with cooldowns | | **Combat Status** | `/ocl check` - Check current PvP status | | **Plugin Info** | `/ocl info` - View plugin information and statistics | | **Update Checker** | Automatic notification when new version is available | --- ## рҹ“Ҙ Installation Guide | Step | Action | |------|--------| | 1пёҸвғЈ | **Download** вҖ” Get the latest `.jar` from [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/plugin/outcombatlog) | | 2пёҸвғЈ | **Install** вҖ” Place the JAR into your server's `plugins/` folder | | 3пёҸвғЈ | **Restart** вҖ” Restart your server (or use `/reload` if you must) | | 4пёҸвғЈ | **Configure** вҖ” Edit `plugins/OutCombatLog/config.yml` to your liking | | 5пёҸвғЈ | **Enjoy!** вҖ” Players are now protected from combat loggers | > **вҡ пёҸ Important:** A full server restart is strongly recommended over `/reload` for optimal performance and to avoid any plugin conflicts. ## рҹ“Ҡ bStats Metrics OutCombatLog uses bStats to collect anonymous usage statistics. This helps us improve the plugin based on real usage data. Below is the live statistics chart for OutCombatLog:

--- ## рҹҺ® Commands & Permissions ### рҹ‘Ө Player Commands | Command | Description | Permission | Default | |---------|-------------|------------|---------| | `/ocl` | Main plugin command | `outcombatlog.use` | вң… All players | | `/ocl list` | List all items with cooldowns | `outcombatlog.use` | вң… All players | | `/ocl check` | Check current PvP status | `outcombatlog.use` | вң… All players | | `/outcombatlog` | Alias for main command | `outcombatlog.use` | вң… All players | | `/combatlog` | Alias for main command | `outcombatlog.use` | вң… All players | | `/cl` | Alias for main command | `outcombatlog.use` | вң… All players | | `/pvp` | Alias for main command | `outcombatlog.use` | вң… All players | ### рҹ‘‘ Admin Commands | Command | Description | Permission | Default | |---------|-------------|------------|---------| | `/ocl reload` | Reload plugin configuration | `outcombatlog.admin` | вқҢ Ops only | | `/ocl info` | View detailed plugin information | `outcombatlog.admin` | вқҢ Ops only | ### рҹ”‘ Permissions | Permission | Description | Default | |------------|-------------|---------| | `outcombatlog.use` | Use basic plugin commands | вң… All players | | `outcombatlog.admin` | Admin commands (reload, info) | вқҢ Ops only | | `outcombatlog.bypass` | Bypass all combat restrictions | вқҢ Ops only | --- ## вҡҷпёҸ Configuration Deep Dive
рҹ“Ғ Core Configuration ```yaml prefix: "&f[&x&E&5&4&1&E&7бҙ„&x&D&B&3&9&D&EбҙҸ&x&D&1&3&1&D&5бҙҚ&x&C&7&2&9&C&CКҷ&x&B&D&2&1&C&3бҙҖ&x&B&3&1&8&B&Aбҙӣ&x&A&9&1&0&B&1Кҹ&x&9&F&0&8&A&8бҙҸ&x&9&5&0&0&9&FЙў&f]" # PvP tag duration (in seconds) pvp-time: 30 # Death mode in PvP # true: Victim exits PvP, BUT killer remains in PvP # false: Both players exit PvP combat-on-death: true # Logout broadcast radius (in blocks) # 0 = disable broadcasting logout-broadcast-radius: 25 # Commands allowed during PvP allowed-commands: - msg - tell - w - r - reply - whisper - report - help - discord - donate - sites - combatlog - outcombatlog - ocl - pvp # List of all materials: https://hub.spigotmc.org/javadocs/spigot/org/bukkit/Material.html item-cooldowns: ENDER_PEARL: 15 ENCHANTED_GOLDEN_APPLE: 60 GOLDEN_APPLE: 30 CHORUS_FRUIT: 10 FIREWORK_ROCKET: 10 ENDER_CHEST: 30 bossbar: # Enable/disable bossbar enabled: true # Bossbar color # Available colors: BLUE, GREEN, PINK, PURPLE, RED, WHITE, YELLOW color: "RED" # Bossbar style # Available styles: # вҖў PROGRESS - solid bar # вҖў NOTCHED_6 - divided into 6 parts # вҖў NOTCHED_10 - divided into 10 parts # вҖў NOTCHED_12 - divided into 12 parts # вҖў NOTCHED_20 - divided into 20 parts overlay: "PROGRESS" text: "&5вҡ” &x&E&5&4&1&E&7бҙ„&x&D&B&3&9&D&EбҙҸ&x&D&1&3&1&D&5бҙҚ&x&C&7&2&9&C&CКҷ&x&B&D&2&1&C&3бҙҖ&x&B&3&1&8&B&Aбҙӣ&x&A&9&1&0&B&1Кҹ&x&9&F&0&8&A&8бҙҸ&x&9&5&0&0&9&FЙў &5вҡ”" # Show remaining time in text # true - %seconds% will be replaced with the number (15, 5) # false - %seconds% will be removed or left as is show-time: true sounds: # Enable/disable all sounds enabled: true # Sound when entering PvP combat-start: "BLOCK_BELL_USE" # Ticking sound before PvP ends combat-tick: "BLOCK_NOTE_BLOCK_HAT" # Sound when PvP ends combat-end: "ENTITY_PLAYER_LEVELUP" messages-enabled: logout-punishment: true logout-return-message: true command-blocked: true combat-status: true not-in-combat: true config-reloaded: true no-permission: true enderchest-blocked: true combat-ended: true item-cooldown: true plugin-info: true cooldowns-list: true messages: # When player logs out during PvP logout-punishment: "&e%player% &cКҹбҙҮкң°бҙӣ бҙӣКңбҙҮ кңұбҙҮКҖбҙ бҙҮКҖ бҙ…бҙңКҖЙӘЙҙЙў бҙҳбҙ бҙҳ!" # When returning after logout punishment logout-return-message: "&cКҸбҙҸбҙң КҹбҙҮкң°бҙӣ бҙ…бҙңКҖЙӘЙҙЙў бҙҳбҙ бҙҳ бҙҖЙҙбҙ… бҙЎбҙҮКҖбҙҮ бҙҖбҙңбҙӣбҙҸбҙҚбҙҖбҙӣЙӘбҙ„бҙҖКҹКҹКҸ бҙӢЙӘКҹКҹбҙҮбҙ…..." # Command blocked during PvP command-blocked: "&cвқҢ бҙ„бҙҖЙҙЙҙбҙҸбҙӣ бҙңкңұбҙҮ бҙ„бҙҸбҙҚбҙҚбҙҖЙҙбҙ…кңұ бҙ…бҙңКҖЙӘЙҙЙў бҙ„бҙҸбҙҚКҷбҙҖбҙӣ!" # Combat status check combat-status: "&6вҡ” бҙҳбҙ бҙҳ кңұбҙӣбҙҖбҙӣбҙңкңұ:\n &7в”” бҙӣЙӘбҙҚбҙҮ КҹбҙҮкң°бҙӣ: &e%time% кңұбҙҮбҙ„\n &7в”” бҙҸбҙҳбҙҳбҙҸЙҙбҙҮЙҙбҙӣ: &c%opponent%" # Not in combat not-in-combat: "&aвң“ КҸбҙҸбҙң бҙҖКҖбҙҮ ЙҙбҙҸбҙӣ ЙӘЙҙ бҙҳбҙ бҙҳ бҙҚбҙҸбҙ…бҙҮ" # Config reloaded config-reloaded: "&aвң“ бҙ„бҙҸЙҙкң°ЙӘЙўбҙңКҖбҙҖбҙӣЙӘбҙҸЙҙ КҖбҙҮКҹбҙҸбҙҖбҙ…бҙҮбҙ…" # No permission no-permission: "&cЙҙбҙҸ бҙҳбҙҮКҖбҙҚЙӘкңұкңұЙӘбҙҸЙҙ" # Ender chest blocked enderchest-blocked: "&cвқҢ бҙ„бҙҖЙҙЙҙбҙҸбҙӣ бҙҸбҙҳбҙҮЙҙ бҙҮЙҙбҙ…бҙҮКҖ бҙ„КңбҙҮкңұбҙӣ бҙ…бҙңКҖЙӘЙҙЙў бҙ„бҙҸбҙҚКҷбҙҖбҙӣ!" # Combat ended combat-ended: "&aвң“ бҙҳбҙ бҙҳ бҙҚбҙҸбҙ…бҙҮ бҙҮЙҙбҙ…бҙҮбҙ…" # Item on cooldown item-cooldown: "&cвқҢ ЙӘбҙӣбҙҮбҙҚ бҙҸЙҙ бҙ„бҙҸбҙҸКҹбҙ…бҙҸбҙЎЙҙ: &e%.1f &cкңұбҙҮбҙ„" # Plugin info plugin-info: "&fбҙҳКҹбҙңЙўЙӘЙҙ ЙӘЙҙкң°бҙҸ:\n&7в”” &fбҙ бҙҮКҖкңұЙӘбҙҸЙҙ: &e2.3\n&7в”” &fбҙҖбҙңбҙӣКңбҙҸКҖ: &evЙӘкңұкңұбҙҮбҙ… кңұбҙӣбҙңбҙ…ЙӘбҙҸ\n&7в”” &fбҙҳбҙ бҙҳ бҙӣЙӘбҙҚбҙҮ: &e%pvptime% кңұбҙҮбҙ„\n&7в”” &fбҙ…бҙҮбҙҖбҙӣКң бҙҚбҙҸбҙ…бҙҮ: &e%deathmode%\n&7в”” &fЙӘбҙӣбҙҮбҙҚкңұ: &e%itemscount%" # Cooldowns list header cooldowns-list: "&fЙӘбҙӣбҙҮбҙҚкңұ бҙЎЙӘбҙӣКң бҙ„бҙҸбҙҸКҹбҙ…бҙҸбҙЎЙҙкңұ:\n%items%" # Cooldown item format cooldowns-item-format: "&7в”” &f%material%: &e%cooldown% кңұбҙҮбҙ„" check-updates: true
